pageContext.name: Ultraman Suit Zoffy (Anime Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Threezero present the Ultraman Suit Zoffy (Anime Version) Sixth Scale Figure.  From the Ultraman Season 2 anime, ULTRAMAN SUIT ZOFFY is now available as a 1/6th scale articulated figure! This ULTRAMAN SUIT was worn by Shin Hayata, the father of Shinjiro, who had once fused with Ultraman to protect the Earth in his youth.  FigZero 1/6 ULTRAMAN SUIT ZOFFY (Anime Version) stands approximately 30.5cm (~12 ) tall, and is a fully-articulated figure with over 40 points of articulation. The collectible has a detailed paint application and decals, and is constructed partially of die-cast zinc alloy and other metal parts. LED light-up features are installed at the eyes and the Color Timer on the chest.  Effect parts included with this item are one pair of Specium Blade pieces to attach to the forearms, and one pair of Ultra Slash pieces to attach to the wrists. Other accessories include four pairs of interchangeable hands: One pair of fists, one pair of posed hands, one pair of relaxed hands, and one pair of Specium Beam shooting pose hands.
